_comment: Manual intelligence feed — paste signal summaries from paid sites (TradingView Pro, Bitcoin Live, etc.) here. The intel_aggregator.py reads this file automatically each CI run.
_instructions: 1. Open your paid intel source (TradingView Pro, Bitcoin Live, etc.)
2. Paste the key signal as a short note in 'signal' field below
3. Set 'bullish': true or false based on the signal direction
4. Set 'confidence': 0-100 based on how strong the signal is
6. Save this file — intel.html will pick it up on the next CI run (or refresh)
7. Old entries are auto-ignored after 7 days (based on the date field)

feeds.label: BTC Weekly Chart
feeds.signal: BTC holding above 200-week SMA — bull market structure intact
feeds.notes: Example entry — replace with real signal from TradingView Pro

feeds.label: BTC On-Chain
feeds.signal: Exchange outflows accelerating — accumulation phase detected
feeds.notes: Example entry — replace with real signal from Bitcoin Live
